RST-004.evidence: getCommitDiff (line 78) and getMergeInfo (line 103) are UNEXPORTED internal functions — explicitly listed in rubric-codebase mapping as RST-004 violations. They are internal to getCommitData. The agent should have instrumented getCommitData (exported) instead.

SCH-001.evidence: All 3 spans named 'commit_story.context.collect_chat_messages'. These are git operations (diff-tree, rev-list, log), not chat message collection. Names do not map to the operations they represent. Expected names: commit_story.collect_git, commit_story.git_diff, commit_story.git_merge_info. Per rubric-codebase mapping, SCH-001 is a soft quality guideline — naming quality fails criteria #3 (meaningful and maps to operation).
